reply.text: Im pressing charges you just distracted the entire gym with one story

messages.text: no
security is crazy, i just watched the gray hoodie crisis unfold
prove it
hard not to when the gray sweatshirt and black leggings combo drops
you talk like my outfit owes you child support
it does, i lost custody of my focus the second i opened ig
sounds like a you problem, stay locked in
so youre choosing me?
you got jokes, now show it
thats a lie, even the dumbbells turned their heads
they turned because that pink sign has eyes, relax
sign was staring but you definitely caused the 3 car pileup
and you still finished that thirsty paragraph anyway huh
i've been watching your stuff for a while
file it with the other delusions, youll be fine
watch me back it up
keep talking, this is still weak
because you want to
here
surprise
